---
title: "Marine ecology, coastal remote sensing and geospatial analysis"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Hi, I'm **Fer**. This site under construction is where I will share my thoughts, projects and data explorations.



<video autoplay muted loop playsinline style="width:100%;border-radius:6px;">
  <source src="/assets/merged_hero.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---

::: {.update-card}

## Quantifying *Rugulopteryx* beach wrack accumulation

::: {.update-card__meta}
30 April 2026
:::

*Rugulopteryx okamurae* detected at Arbeyal Beach, where it had been previously observed. Here, we attempt to quantify the volume of the wrack accumulation.

[Open the project update](https://fer-at-sea.github.io/rugu_arbeyal/){.update-card__link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

::: {.update-card}

## EOPF Zarr Community Notebook Competition

::: {.update-card__meta}
29 April 2026
:::

The notebook *Cloud-native intertidal vegetation monitoring with Sentinel-2 and EOPF Zarr*, by Fernando García-González and Pablo González González, was selected as one of the winning entries in the EOPF Zarr Community Notebook Competition, part of the EOPF Toolkit initiative developed with ESA, Development Seed and Sparkgeo. All winning notebooks will be integrated into the [EOPF 101 online book](https://eopf-toolkit.github.io/eopf-101/). Until the integration is completed the notebook can be accessed on [GitHub](https://github.com/fer-at-sea/community-notebook-competition/blob/fer-at-sea-submission/submissions/cloud_native_intertidal_vegetation_monitoring_with_sentinel2_and_EOPF_Zarr/submission.ipynb) 


[Open the post on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:7455232416664707072/){.update-card__link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

---
